title: Block Description
description: Information about the block, must have at minimum an "identifier" and can have also the following optional field "menu_category", "states" and/or "traits"

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: Must have a namespace and can't use the "minecraft" one. Example: "namespace:my_block"

menu_category.title: Menu Category
menu_category.description:
Configures the block behavior in inventory and menu category

Properties:
• category (string)
• group (string)
• is_hidden_in_commands (boolean)

defaultSnippets.label: Block Menu Category
defaultSnippets.description: Configures the block behavior in inventory and menu category

states.title: States
states.description: Define custom states for a block that can be referenced in permutation. Each state must contain an array or a "values" with an array or a "min"/"max" range

traits.title: Traits
traits.description:
Change the connection, multiblock state, placement position and/or direction behaviors of a block

Properties:
• minecraft:connection (object) = {"enabled_states":[]
• minecraft:multi_block (object) = {"direction":"up","e
• minecraft:placement_direction (object) = {"blocks_to_corner_w
• minecraft:placement_position (object) = {"enabled_states":[]

defaultSnippets.label: Block Traits
defaultSnippets.description: Change the connection, multiblock state, placement position and/or direction behaviors of a block
